data_source: Tiingo Free API with local CSV cache fallback, tiered refresh, 429 circuit breaker, append-only cache updates
update_mode: large universe with tiered API-saving refresh: core daily, watchlist every 3 days, long tail weekly; cached data is always loaded; Tiingo requests are only spent when cache is stale and ticker is due; existing historical CSV rows are not overwritten, only new dates are appended
strategy_version: Eason Master US Market Monitor Cloud Sync v4.5.1 tiered-cache-refresh-warning-cleanup

refresh_policy.long_tail_weekly: all other tickers, deterministic weekday rotation

universe.tiingo_circuit_reason: Tiingo 429 circuit breaker opened after ADI: ADI HTTP 429: {"detail":"Error: You have run over your hourly request allocation. Please upgrade at https://api.tiingo.com/pricing to have your limits increased."}
universe.note: A ticker can remain in the universe even if not refreshed today. ChatGPT should check update_log status and latest_date.

rule_engine.note: Samples below minimum are reported but should not be used as primary buy evidence.
